title: SICP 4.1 metacircular derived forms
goal: Add tests/sicp/ch4_metacircular_derived_forms.esk covering SICP-derived forms such as cond, let, let*, letrec, named let, and/or where applicable inside the metacircular evaluator.
acceptance: ICC observes sicp_ch4_metacircular_derived_forms_r and sicp_ch4_metacircular_derived_forms_aot PASS
ux_payoff: Prevents 4.1 from being covered only by core eval/apply forms.
